project_type: TypeScript monorepo with 9 apps and 22 packages
build_system: tsc --noEmit for type checking, no package.json in individual packages, workspace-level tsconfig.json
test_framework: Custom test runner (scripts/test.js) that validates file structure and exports
verification_instructions: Run NODE_OPTIONS='' node scripts/test.js - it checks all packages have src/index.ts, counts files/exports/lines
setup_instructions: No setup needed - all code is written directly, no npm install
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no npm install, no external dependencies. All code must be self-contained TypeScript. NODE_OPTIONS must be cleared to run node scripts.
contribution_requirements: Each package has src/index.ts barrel export, src/types.ts for types, src/core/ for implementations. Files average 300-500 lines with real algorithm implementations.
key_patterns: Classes with full implementations (~300-500 lines each). Types defined in src/types.ts. Barrel exports from src/index.ts. No package.json or tsconfig.json in individual packages (only src/). Comment headers: // ============================================================================
directory_structure: packages/<name>/src/index.ts (barrel), packages/<name>/src/types.ts (types), packages/<name>/src/core/*.ts (implementations). Apps in apps/<name>/. Scripts in scripts/.
